# [PKT-RLS-007](task-0052): Release Please Config Management

## Purpose

Manage Release Please configuration.

## Scope

- Config format
- Management logic
- Validation

## Implementation

1. Define config format
2. Implement management
3. Add validation

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Config format defined
2. Management works
3. Validated
